plugins/adr-manager/skills/adr-managemen.summary: {"purpose": "Sequential Identifier Generator that scans artifact directories (Specs, Tasks, ADRs, Chronicles, BRs, BWs) to find the next available sequence number and prevent ID collisions.", "layer": "Investigate / Utils", "supported_object_types": ["spec", "task", "adr", "br", "bw"], "usage": ["python plugins/adr-manager/scripts/next_number.py --type spec", "python plugins/adr-manager/scripts/next_number.py --type all", "python plugins/adr-manager/scripts/next_number.py --dir legacy-system/business-rules --pattern \"BR-(\\d{3})\""], "args": ["--type / -t: artifact type (spec, task, adr, br, bw, all)", "--dir / -d: ad-hoc directory scan", "--pattern: regex for --dir", "--recursive: scan subdirs", "--json: JSON output"], "inputs": ["kitty-specs/", "tasks/", "ADRs/", "legacy-system/business-rules/", "legacy-system/business-workflows/"], "outputs": ["Next available ID string (e.g. '0045') to stdout"], "dependencies": [], "consumed_by": ["Manual workflow execution"], "key_functions": ["find_max_number(): finds highest existing integer for a type", "get_next_number(): fills ID gaps by finding first unused integer", "find_max_in_directory(): ad-hoc scan with custom regex", "show_all(): prints next ID for all artifact types"]}

plugins/agent-loops/hooks/closure-guard..summary: {"purpose": "Stop-hook that blocks premature agent session exit when a learning loop is active by checking for an active loop state file and emitting a JSON 'block' decision if closure has not been completed.", "layer": "Agent Hooks / Lifecycle", "supported_object_types": ["Claude Stop Hook", "Agent Loop State"], "usage": ["Registered as a Stop hook in Claude hooks.json; executed automatically by Claude on session exit"], "args": ["stdin: hook input JSON (Claude stop hook protocol)"], "inputs": [".claude/agent-loop-state.local.md (frontmatter: iteration, max_iterations, closure_done, pattern)"], "outputs": ["JSON decision block: {decision: 'block'/'allow', reason, systemMessage}"], "dependencies": ["jq", "sed", "bash"], "consumed_by": ["Claude Code stop hook system"], "key_functions": ["Parses frontmatter from loop state file", "Increments iteration counter", "Emits jq-generated block JSON if closure_done != true"]}

plugins/agent-scaffolders/skills/audit-p.summary: {"purpose": "Audits a plugin directory against the Agent Skills Open Standard, checking for required structure (.claude-plugin/, plugin.json, SKILL.md, references/acceptance-criteria.md) and flagging errors and warnings.", "layer": "Meta-Execution", "supported_object_types": [".claude-plugin formatted directories", "Agent Skills"], "usage": ["python3 audit.py --path <plugin-directory>"], "args": ["--path (required): absolute or relative path to the plugin directory"], "inputs": ["plugin.json", "SKILL.md files", ".mcp.json and hooks.json structures"], "outputs": ["Terminal stdout: AUDIT PASSED / AUDIT FAILED with itemised errors and warnings"], "dependencies": [], "consumed_by": ["User (CLI)", "ecosystem-standards Agent Skill"], "key_functions": ["audit_plugin(): recursively checks directory presence, plugin.json, SKILL.md line count, illegal .sh/.ps1 scripts, and acceptance-criteria.md"]}

plugins/agent-scaffolders/skills/create-.summary: {"purpose": "Deterministically generates compliant directory architectures and boilerplate files for Agent Skills, Plugins, Hooks, Sub-Agents, and Commands using Jinja templates from the ../templates/ directory.", "layer": "Meta-Execution", "supported_object_types": ["Plugins", "Skills", "Hooks", "Sub-Agents", "Commands"], "usage": ["python3 scaffold.py --type skill --name my-skill --path ./plugins --desc \"My description\"", "python3 scaffold.py --type plugin --name my-plugin --path ./plugins", "python3 scaffold.py --type hook --event PreToolUse --path ./plugins/my-plugin --action command"], "args": ["--type (required): plugin|skill|hook|sub-agent|command|mcp", "--name (required): slug identifier", "--path (required): destination directory", "--desc: description for skills/agents", "--event (default PreToolUse): hook lifecycle event", "--action (default command): command|prompt|agent"], "inputs": ["../templates/*.jinja template files"], "outputs": ["Generated directory tree, SKILL.md, plugin.json, hooks.json, .mcp.json, .mmd diagram, README.md"], "dependencies": ["Jinja templates from agent-scaffolders/templates/"], "consumed_by": ["Agent Scaffolders skill (create-plugin, create-skill, etc.)"], "key_functions": ["create_plugin(): full plugin directory with manifest, README, mmd, hooks", "create_skill(): skill dir with SKILL.md, references/, acceptance-criteria.md, execute.py", "create_hook(): appends hook JSON entry to hooks.json", "create_sub_agent(): scaffolds sub-agent markdown", "create_command(): scaffolds command markdown"]}

plugins/coding-conventions/templates/js-.summary: {"purpose": "Boilerplate Jinja-style template for the Gold Standard JavaScript/Node.js tool header, defining the JSDoc comment format (Purpose, Layer, Usage, CLI Arguments, Key Functions, Consumed by) for all new JS tools.", "layer": "Template / Coding Conventions", "supported_object_types": ["JavaScript/Node.js scripts"], "usage": ["Reference template \u2014 copy and fill {{placeholders}} when creating new JS tools"], "args": [], "inputs": [], "outputs": ["Scaffold JS file header"], "dependencies": [], "consumed_by": ["scaffold.py", "agent-scaffolders skill", "coding-conventions SKILL.md"], "key_functions": []}

plugins/coding-conventions/templates/pyt.summary: {"purpose": "Boilerplate Jinja-style template for the Gold Standard Python script header, defining the mandatory docstring format (Purpose, Layer, Usage, Supported Object Types, CLI Arguments, Input Files, Output, Key Functions, Script Dependencies, Consumed by) for all new Python tools.", "layer": "Template / Coding Conventions", "supported_object_types": ["Python scripts"], "usage": ["Reference template \u2014 copy and fill {{placeholders}} when creating new Python tools"], "args": [], "inputs": [], "outputs": ["Scaffold Python file header"], "dependencies": [], "consumed_by": ["scaffold.py", "agent-scaffolders skill", "coding-conventions SKILL.md"], "key_functions": []}

plugins/context-bundler/scripts/manifest.summary: {"purpose": "Primary CLI for the Context Bundler that handles all manifest lifecycle operations: initializing from templates, adding/removing/updating file entries, listing and searching contents, and triggering the bundle compilation step.", "layer": "Curate / Bundler", "supported_object_types": ["Generic JSON manifest files", "Base manifest templates"], "usage": ["python manifest_manager.py --manifest temp/my.json init --type generic --bundle-title \"My Bundle\"", "python manifest_manager.py --manifest temp/my.json add --path docs/example.md --note \"Reference doc\"", "python manifest_manager.py --manifest temp/my.json bundle --output temp/out.md", "python manifest_manager.py --manifest temp/my.json list", "python manifest_manager.py --manifest temp/my.json remove --path docs/example.md"], "args": ["Global: --manifest (custom path), --base (template type)", "init: --bundle-title, --type", "add: --path (required), --note", "remove: --path (required)", "update: --path, --note, --new-path", "bundle: --output"], "inputs": ["plugins/standalone/context-bundler/base-manifests/*.json (templates)", "Custom manifest JSON"], "outputs": ["Manifest JSON (on init/add/update/remove)", "temp/context-bundles/[title].md (on bundle)"], "dependencies": ["bundle.py (invoked for bundle subcommand)"], "consumed_by": ["context-bundling SKILL.md"], "key_functions": ["init_manifest(): bootstraps from base template", "add_file(): appends entry if not duplicate", "bundle(): delegates to bundle.py", "get_base_manifest_path(): resolves template via index or fallback", "load_manifest() / save_manifest(): JSON I/O"]}

plugins/context-bundler/scripts/path_res.summary: {"purpose": "Shared utility library providing cross-platform project root detection and path resolution, with optional loading of the Master Object Collection for legacy-system artifact lookup by object ID.", "layer": "Curate / Bundler", "supported_object_types": ["File paths", "legacy-system artifact IDs"], "usage": ["Import as library: from path_resolver import resolve_root, resolve_path"], "args": [], "inputs": ["PROJECT_ROOT env var (optional)", "legacy-system/reference-data/master_object_collection.json (optional)"], "outputs": ["Absolute path string"], "dependencies": [], "consumed_by": ["manifest_manager.py", "bundle.py", "other context-bundler scripts"], "key_functions": ["PathResolver.get_project_root(): env-var then heuristic (.agent/ landmark)", "PathResolver.to_absolute(): joins root with relative path", "PathResolver.load_master_collection(): cached load of master_object_collection.json", "PathResolver.get_object_path(): resolves artifact path from object ID and type", "resolve_root() / resolve_path(): module-level convenience wrappers"]}

plugins/context-bundler/skills/context-b.summary: {"purpose": "Context Bundler Engine that reads a JSON manifest of file paths and concatenates their contents into a single annotated Markdown artifact suitable for LLM context ingestion or external red-team review.", "layer": "Curate / Bundler", "supported_object_types": ["JSON manifests", "Markdown, Python, JSON, TypeScript, JavaScript source files"], "usage": ["python plugins/context-bundler/scripts/bundle.py --manifest my_manifest.json --bundle output.md"], "args": ["--manifest (required): path to JSON manifest file", "--bundle (required): output path for bundled Markdown"], "inputs": ["JSON manifest with {title, description, files: [{path, note}]}"], "outputs": ["Single Markdown file with ToC, file headers, and fenced code blocks"], "dependencies": [], "consumed_by": ["manifest_manager.py bundle subcommand", "context-bundling SKILL.md"], "key_functions": ["generate_bundle(): resolves manifest entries (including directory expansion), writes ToC and code-fenced file contents to output"]}

plugins/excel-to-csv/skills/excel-to-csv.summary: {"purpose": "Converts all or selected sheets and named tables from an Excel workbook (.xlsx/.xls) into individual UTF-8-BOM CSV files, intelligently detecting header rows and skipping empty sheets.", "layer": "Data Processing Utilities", "supported_object_types": [".xlsx", ".xls"], "usage": ["python3 convert.py --excel data.xlsx --sheets \"Sheet1\" --outdir ./output", "python3 convert.py --excel data.xlsx --sheets \"SalesTable\" --outdir ./output", "python3 convert.py --excel data.xlsx --outdir ./output"], "args": ["--excel / -e (required): path to Excel workbook", "--outdir / -o (default '.'): output directory", "--sheets / -s: comma-separated sheet or table names (default: all sheets)", "--write-empty: write CSV even for empty sheets"], "inputs": [".xlsx or .xls Excel workbook"], "outputs": ["<sanitized_name>.csv per extracted sheet/table in outdir"], "dependencies": ["pandas", "openpyxl"], "consumed_by": ["excel-to-csv SKILL.md", "User (CLI)"], "key_functions": ["sanitize_sheet_name(): makes filesystem-safe filename", "convert_excel_to_csv(): loads workbook, resolves sheet/table targets via openpyxl, reads with pandas, drops empty rows/cols, auto-detects header row, writes CSV"]}

plugins/link-checker/skills/link-checker.summary: {"purpose": "Recursively scans markdown, JSON, and .mmd files in a directory for broken relative links (excluding web URLs), reports files with missing targets, and writes a log file.", "layer": "Curate / Cli_Entry_Points", "supported_object_types": [".md", ".txt", ".json", ".markdown", ".mmd"], "usage": ["python check_broken_paths.py [target_dir]", "python check_broken_paths.py --file docs/my-doc.md"], "args": ["target_dir (positional, default CWD): directory to scan", "--file: single file to check"], "inputs": ["Documentation files in repo directories"], "outputs": ["broken_links.log (written to script dir)", "stdout summary with file:broken-link pairs"], "dependencies": [], "consumed_by": ["link-checker-agent SKILL.md", "User (CLI)"], "key_functions": ["find_files(): walks directory tree, excludes noise dirs and log files", "check_broken_links(): extracts markdown, HTML, and legacy-system ref patterns, checks existence relative to file", "main(): orchestrates scan and log write"]}

{"purpose": "Enriches markdown documentation files by auto-linking bare legacy-system object IDs (Forms, Reports, PLLs, DB objects, Roles, BRs, BWs) to their primary artifact paths using the Master Object Collection, while removing stale (Reference Missing) placeholders and normalising [[xml]]/[[xml-md]] artifact tags.", "layer": "Curate / Utilities", "supported_object_types": ["Markdown documentation files", "legacy-system Forms, Reports, PLLs, DB objects"], "usage": ["python enrich_links_v2.py --file docs/my-overview.md", "python enrich_links_v2.py --all"], "args": ["--file: specific markdown file to enrich", "--all: process all legacy-system documentation directories"], "inputs": ["legacy-system/reference-data/master_object_collection.json", "legacy-system/**/*.md"], "outputs": ["Modified .md files with embedded markdown links"], "dependencies": ["legacy-system/reference-data/master_object_collection.json"], "consumed_by": ["link-checker-agent SKILL.md", "User (CLI)"], "key_functions": ["load_master_collection(): builds case-insensitive object lookup", "enrich_content(): 5-phase enrichment pipeline (cleanup, bracket-link, artifact-tag, specific-pattern, catch-all)", "enrich_file(): skips code blocks, applies enrich_content per line", "create_link(): resolves primary artifact path from object ID and type", "is_valid_role(): filters trigger/event false positives from role detection"]}

{"purpose": "Finds and generates relative markdown links to all source file artifacts (.md overview, .xml, .pll, .fmb) for a given legacy-system identifier by walking the legacy-system directory tree.", "layer": "Curate / Utilities", "supported_object_types": ["Oracle Forms (.fmb)", "Oracle Libraries (.pll)", "XML exports", "Markdown overviews"], "usage": ["python find_source_links.py FORM0000", "python find_source_links.py EXAMPLE_LIB --doc-path docs/my-doc.md"], "args": ["identifier (positional, required): the ID to search for", "--doc-path: source document path for relative link calculation"], "inputs": ["legacy-system/ directory tree"], "outputs": ["Markdown link strings to stdout"], "dependencies": [], "consumed_by": ["link-checker-agent SKILL.md", "enrich_links_v2.py (conceptually)"], "key_functions": ["find_files(): case-insensitive walk for .md, .xml, .pll, .fmb matches", "generate_links(): builds relative markdown link strings per artifact type"]}

{"purpose": "Indexes the entire repository into a filename\u2192paths JSON map (file_inventory.json) used by smart_fix_links.py to resolve broken links.", "layer": "Curate / Cli_Entry_Points", "supported_object_types": ["All repository files"], "usage": ["python map_repository_files.py"], "args": [], "inputs": ["Current working directory (project root)"], "outputs": ["scripts/file_inventory.json: {filename: [relative_path, ...]} map"], "dependencies": [], "consumed_by": ["smart_fix_links.py"], "key_functions": ["generate_file_map(): os.walk with dir exclusions, maps each filename to all relative paths where it appears"]}

{"purpose": "Auto-corrects broken relative markdown links in .md files using fuzzy basename matching against the file_inventory.json produced by map_repository_files.py, adding (Reference Missing) placeholders for unresolvable links.", "layer": "Curate / Cli_Entry_Points", "supported_object_types": [".md files"], "usage": ["python smart_fix_links.py"], "args": [], "inputs": ["scripts/file_inventory.json (from map_repository_files.py)", "All .md files in CWD recursively"], "outputs": ["In-place updated .md files with corrected relative paths"], "dependencies": ["file_inventory.json (must run map_repository_files.py first)"], "consumed_by": ["link-checker-agent SKILL.md", "User (CLI)"], "key_functions": ["load_inventory(): loads file_inventory.json", "fix_links_in_file(): regex-replaces broken [label](path) entries; uses basename lookup then case-insensitive and hyphen-stripped fallbacks; leaves ambiguous matches untouched", "calculate_relative_path(): os.path.relpath between source and target file"]}

plugins/mermaid-to-png/skills/convert-me.summary: {"purpose": "Converts a Mermaid (.mmd/.mermaid) diagram file to a PNG image using the @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli (mmdc) via npx, with configurable scale factor and theme.", "layer": "Tools & Generation", "supported_object_types": ["Mermaid standard (.mmd)", "PNG binary export"], "usage": ["python3 convert.py -i input.mmd -o output.png -s 2 -t dark"], "args": ["-i/--input (required): input .mmd file", "-o/--output (required): output .png file", "-s/--scale (default 1): resolution scale factor", "-t/--theme (default 'default'): default|forest|dark|neutral"], "inputs": [".mmd file with Mermaid diagram syntax"], "outputs": [".png image file"], "dependencies": ["npx", "@mermaid-js/mermaid-cli (auto-installed via npx -y)"], "consumed_by": ["User (CLI)", "convert-mermaid Agent Skill"], "key_functions": ["convert_mermaid(): writes temporary puppeteer-config.json (--no-sandbox), runs mmdc via subprocess, removes config on completion"]}

plugins/plugin-manager/skills/plugin-mai.summary: {"purpose": "Fast filesystem sanity-check that verifies every plugin in plugins/ follows the standard structure (skills/<skill>/SKILL.md present, no non-exempt top-level scripts/ directories), reporting errors and warnings per plugin.", "layer": "Plugin Manager / Structure Validation", "supported_object_types": ["Plugin directories in plugins/"], "usage": ["python3 plugins/plugin-manager/scripts/audit_structure.py"], "args": [], "inputs": ["plugins/ directory tree"], "outputs": ["stdout: per-plugin error/warning report; exit code 1 if critical errors found"], "dependencies": [], "consumed_by": ["plugin-maintenance SKILL.md", "User (CLI)"], "key_functions": ["audit_plugin(): checks skills/, SKILL.md presence, loose .py files, deprecated top-level scripts/", "main(): iterates plugins/ and aggregates results"]}

{"purpose": "Generates a standardized README.md for any plugin directory that is missing one, extracting the description from plugin.json, SKILL.md frontmatter, or README.md as fallback sources.", "layer": "Plugin Manager / Documentation", "supported_object_types": ["Plugin directories in plugins/"], "usage": ["python3 plugins/plugin-manager/scripts/generate_readmes.py", "python3 plugins/plugin-manager/scripts/generate_readmes.py --apply"], "args": ["--apply: write README files (default is dry-run preview)"], "inputs": ["plugins/<plugin>/.claude-plugin/plugin.json", "plugins/<plugin>/skills/*/SKILL.md"], "outputs": ["plugins/<plugin>/README.md (when --apply used)"], "dependencies": [], "consumed_by": ["plugin-maintenance SKILL.md", "User (CLI)"], "key_functions": ["get_plugin_description(): reads plugin.json \u2192 SKILL.md frontmatter \u2192 README first-line", "generate_readme(): writes standardised README.md template"]}

{"purpose": "Automates the full plugin ecosystem synchronization: clones/pulls the vendor source repository, runs update_from_vendor.py to refresh local plugins, and runs sync_with_inventory.py to update all agent configurations.", "layer": "Plugin Manager / Bootstrap", "supported_object_types": ["Plugin vendor repository", "Local plugins/", "Agent environments"], "usage": ["python3 plugins/plugin-manager/scripts/plugin_bootstrap.py", "python3 plugins/plugin-manager/scripts/plugin_bootstrap.py --repo <url> --target antigravity"], "args": ["--repo (default: GitHub URL): vendor git repository", "--vendor-dir (default: .vendor/agent-plugins-skills): local vendor path", "--target (default: auto): agent sync target"], "inputs": ["Remote vendor git repo", "plugins/ directory"], "outputs": ["Updated local plugins", "Synced agent environment artifacts"], "dependencies": ["update_from_vendor.py", "sync_with_inventory.py"], "consumed_by": ["plugin-bootstrap SKILL.md", "/plugin-bridge_update workflow"], "key_functions": ["ensure_vendor_source(): git clone or pull", "update_local_plugins(): runs update_from_vendor.py", "sync_agent_configs(): runs sync_with_inventory.py with --target"]}

{"purpose": "Scans a plugins/ directory and generates a JSON inventory of all available plugins, extracting name, description, version and path from plugin.json, SKILL.md frontmatter, or README.md.", "layer": "Plugin Manager / Inventory", "supported_object_types": ["Plugin directories in plugins/"], "usage": ["python3 plugin_inventory.py", "python3 plugin_inventory.py --root . --output plugins-inventory.json"], "args": ["--root (default '.'): project root with plugins/ subdirectory", "--output: save JSON to file (default: print to stdout)"], "inputs": ["plugins/ directory tree"], "outputs": ["JSON array of {name, description, path, version?} per plugin"], "dependencies": ["yaml (PyYAML, used in parse_frontmatter)"], "consumed_by": ["sync_with_inventory.py (imports scan_plugins)", "User (CLI)"], "key_functions": ["extract_metadata(): prioritised extraction from plugin.json \u2192 SKILL.md \u2192 README.md", "scan_plugins(): iterates plugins/ and builds inventory list"]}

{"purpose": "Dual-inventory sync that compares vendor (source) and local plugins/ to identify deleted plugins, removes their agent artifacts via clean_plugin_artifacts(), then re-installs all local plugins via bridge_installer.py.", "layer": "Plugin Manager / Sync", "supported_object_types": ["Agent environments (.agent, .github, .gemini, .claude)", "Local and vendor plugin sets"], "usage": ["python3 sync_with_inventory.py", "python3 sync_with_inventory.py --dry-run", "python3 sync_with_inventory.py --cleanup-only"], "args": ["--dry-run: simulate cleanup without deleting", "--cleanup-only: skip installation step"], "inputs": [".vendor/agent-plugins-skills/vendor-plugins-inventory.json or .vendor/*/plugins/", "plugins/ (local)"], "outputs": ["local-plugins-inventory.json", "Cleaned and updated agent environment directories"], "dependencies": ["plugin_inventory.py (imports scan_plugins)", "bridge_installer.py (plugin-mapper canonical)"], "consumed_by": ["plugin_bootstrap.py", "/plugin-bridge_update workflow", "inventory-sync SKILL.md"], "key_functions": ["get_inventory_names(): delegates to plugin_inventory.scan_plugins()", "clean_plugin_artifacts(): removes dirs and prefixed files for a plugin from all agent dirs", "run_bridge_installer(): delegates per-plugin installation to bridge_installer.py"]}

plugins/plugin-manager/skills/plugin-rep.summary: {"purpose": "Bulk installer that reads all (or glob-filtered) plugins from this repo and calls install_plugin() for each to copy or symlink them into a target project's plugins directory.", "layer": "Plugin Manager / Replication", "supported_object_types": ["Plugin directories"], "usage": ["python bulk_replicator.py --target ../my-project", "python bulk_replicator.py --target ../my-project --link --filter 'rlm-*'"], "args": ["--target (required): target project root", "--link: use symlinks instead of copy", "--filter (default '*'): glob pattern for plugin names"], "inputs": ["plugins/ directory in repo root"], "outputs": ["Installed/linked plugin directories in target project"], "dependencies": ["plugin_replicator.install_plugin() (local import)"], "consumed_by": ["plugin-bootstrap SKILL.md", "User (CLI)"], "key_functions": ["main(): iterates and installs matched plugins via plugin_replicator.install_plugin()"]}

{"purpose": "Replicates (copies or symlinks) a single named plugin from this repo's plugins/ into a target project's .agent/plugins/ directory, cleaning any existing installation first.", "layer": "Plugin Manager / Replication", "supported_object_types": ["Plugin directories"], "usage": ["python plugin_replicator.py --plugin rlm-factory --target ../my-project", "python plugin_replicator.py --plugin rlm-factory --target ../my-project --link"], "args": ["--plugin (required): plugin directory name", "--target (required): target project root", "--link: create symlink instead of copy"], "inputs": ["plugins/<name>/ in this repo"], "outputs": ["<target>/.agent/plugins/<name>/ (copied or symlinked)"], "dependencies": ["shutil"], "consumed_by": ["bulk_replicator.py (imports install_plugin)", "plugin-replicator SKILL.md", "User (CLI)"], "key_functions": ["install_plugin(): locates source, resolves target, cleans existing, copies or symlinks"]}

plugins/plugin-mapper/skills/agent-bridg.summary: {"purpose": "Installs Agent Plugins (.claude-plugin structure) into target IDE environments (antigravity/.agent, claude/.claude, gemini/.gemini, github/.github) by parsing plugin.json manifests and copying formatted skills, rules, workflows, and command files into the correct target subdirectories.", "layer": "System Integration Layer", "supported_object_types": [".claude-plugin directory structures", "Markdown commands, skills, agents", ".mcp.json and hooks.json manifests"], "usage": ["python3 bridge_installer.py --plugin plugins/rlm-factory --target auto", "python3 bridge_installer.py --plugin plugins/rlm-factory --target antigravity"], "args": ["--plugin (required): path to plugin folder", "--target (default 'auto'): auto|antigravity|github|gemini|claude"], "inputs": ["plugins/<name>/.claude-plugin/plugin.json", "plugins/<name>/skills/*/SKILL.md", "plugins/<name>/commands/*.md", "plugins/<name>/rules/**"], "outputs": [".agent/skills/, .agent/workflows/, .agent/rules/ (and equivalents for other targets)"], "dependencies": [], "consumed_by": ["install_all_plugins.py", "sync_with_inventory.py", "agent-bridge SKILL.md"], "key_functions": ["parse_frontmatter(): extracts YAML from .md files", "command_output_stem(): builds flattened namespaced filename", "install_antigravity() / install_claude() / install_gemini() / install_github(): per-target mapping strategies"]}

{"purpose": "Bulk installer that iterates every directory in plugins/ and invokes bridge_installer.py for each one to batch-deploy all plugins to the specified agent target environment.", "layer": "System Integration", "supported_object_types": ["All plugin directories under plugins/"], "usage": ["python3 install_all_plugins.py --target auto", "python3 install_all_plugins.py --target antigravity"], "args": ["--target (default 'auto'): target environment (auto, antigravity, claude, cursor, roo, OpenHands, etc.)"], "inputs": ["plugins/ directory (all subdirectories)"], "outputs": ["Installed skills/workflows/rules per plugin into target agent directories"], "dependencies": ["bridge_installer.py (sibling script)"], "consumed_by": ["update_agent_system.py", "/plugin-bridge_install workflow", "agent-bridge SKILL.md"], "key_functions": ["main(): iterates plugins/ sorted, calls bridge_installer.py as subprocess for each plugin, reports success/fail count"]}

plugins/rlm-factory/scripts/rlm_config.p.summary: {"purpose": "rlm_config.py (Shared Module)", "layer": "Plugin / RLM Factory", "usage": ["Imported by other scripts"], "args": [], "inputs": [], "outputs": ["RLMConfig object"], "dependencies": [], "key_functions": ["RLMConfig"]}

plugins/rlm-factory/skills/rlm-cleanup-a.summary: {"purpose": "Removes stale or orphan entries from the RLM Cache and Tool Inventory when files are deleted or moved. Ensures cache hygiene.", "layer": "Plugin / Tool Inventory / Hygiene", "supported_object_types": [], "usage": ["python3 plugins/tool-inventory/skills/tool-inventory/scripts/cleanup_cache.py"], "args": [], "inputs": ["rlm_tool_cache.json", "tool_inventory.json"], "outputs": ["Cleaned cache files"], "dependencies": ["rlm_config.py"], "consumed_by": ["manage_tool_inventory.py", "CI/CD"], "key_functions": ["remove_entry", "clean_orphans", "main"]}

plugins/rlm-factory/skills/rlm-curator/s.summary: {"purpose": "Non-destructive diagnostic utility that prints a detailed state summary for all known RLM profiles: resolves config, checks manifest existence, counts discoverable files, and reports model configuration without writing anything to disk.", "layer": "Curate / Rlm", "supported_object_types": ["RLM profiles"], "usage": ["python plugins/rlm-factory/skills/rlm-curator/scripts/debug_rlm.py"], "args": [], "inputs": [".agent/learning/rlm_profiles.json"], "outputs": ["stdout: per-profile state summary (manifest exists, cache path, file count, model, sample file)"], "dependencies": ["rlm_config.RLMConfig, collect_files"], "consumed_by": ["Developer debugging", "rlm-curator SKILL.md"], "key_functions": ["inspect_profile(): loads RLMConfig, checks manifest existence, calls collect_files() and prints summary"]}

{"purpose": "RLM Auditor: Compares the semantic cache against the live filesystem to produce a coverage report. Identifies files on disk not yet in cache (missing) and cache entries whose source files have been deleted (stale).", "layer": "Curate / Rlm", "supported_object_types": ["rlm_summary_cache.json", "rlm_tool_cache.json"], "usage": ["python plugins/rlm-factory/skills/rlm-curator/scripts/inventory.py --profile plugins", "python plugins/rlm-factory/skills/rlm-curator/scripts/inventory.py --profile tools"], "args": ["--profile (required): RLM profile name from rlm_profiles.json"], "inputs": ["rlm_profiles.json profile config", "cache JSON file", "live filesystem via collect_files()"], "outputs": ["stdout: coverage stats (disk count, cache count, coverage %, missing list, stale list)"], "dependencies": ["rlm_config.RLMConfig, load_cache, collect_files"], "consumed_by": ["/rlm-factory_audit workflow", "rlm-curator SKILL.md"], "key_functions": ["audit_inventory(): set-diff between filesystem paths and cache keys, prints coverage statistics"]}

{"purpose": "Centralized configuration and shared utility library for the entire RLM Toolchain. Loads profile settings from .agent/learning/rlm_profiles.json and provides RLMConfig dataclass plus shared helpers (compute_hash, load_cache, save_cache, should_skip, collect_files).", "layer": "Curate / Rlm", "supported_object_types": ["rlm_profiles.json entries", "All files covered by RLM manifests"], "usage": ["from rlm_config import RLMConfig, load_cache, save_cache, collect_files"], "args": ["RLMConfig(profile_name='plugins'): construct from profile name", "RLMConfig.from_profile('tools'): factory class method"], "inputs": [".agent/learning/rlm_profiles.json", "Manifest JSON files referenced in profiles"], "outputs": ["Configured RLMConfig instance giving access to cache_path, manifest_path, prompt_template, include_patterns, allowed_suffixes, llm_model"], "dependencies": [], "consumed_by": ["distiller.py", "query_cache.py", "cleanup_cache.py", "inventory.py", "debug_rlm.py"], "key_functions": ["RLMConfig.__init__(): loads profile JSON, resolves all paths, loads manifest include patterns and prompt template", "compute_hash(): first 16 chars of SHA256 for cache freshness check", "load_cache() / save_cache(): crash-resilient JSON I/O", "should_skip(): extension allowlist + substring exclude filter", "collect_files(): glob pattern and directory expansion with deduplication"]}

plugins/rlm-factory/skills/rlm-distill-o.summary: {"purpose": "The RLM Engine. Performs recursive summarization of repository content using Ollama (or injected summaries). Updates the RLM Cache and triggers inventory updates.", "layer": "Plugin / Tool Inventory / RLM", "supported_object_types": [], "usage": ["python3 plugins/tool-inventory/skills/tool-inventory/scripts/distiller.py --file <path>", "python3 plugins/tool-inventory/skills/tool-inventory/scripts/distiller.py --since <hours>"], "args": ["--file: Single file", "--target: Directory", "--model: Ollama model", "--cleanup: Remove stale", "--force: Force regen", "--summary: Inject summary"], "inputs": ["Source code/docs"], "outputs": ["rlm_tool_cache.json", "rlm_summary_cache.json"], "dependencies": ["rlm_config.py", "manage_tool_inventory.py"], "consumed_by": ["manage_tool_inventory.py", "Manual invocation"], "key_functions": ["call_ollama", "distill", "run_cleanup", "main"]}

plugins/rlm-factory/skills/rlm-search/sc.summary: {"purpose": "Provides instant O(1) semantic search of the RLM ledger. Allows searching by term, listing cached files, and outputting results in JSON.", "layer": "Plugin / Tool Inventory / RLM", "supported_object_types": [], "usage": ["python3 plugins/tool-inventory/skills/tool-inventory/scripts/query_cache.py <term>", "python3 plugins/tool-inventory/skills/tool-inventory/scripts/query_cache.py --list"], "args": ["term: Search term", "--list: List all cached files", "--no-summary: Hide summary", "--json: Output JSON"], "inputs": [".agent/learning/rlm_tool_cache.json"], "outputs": ["Console search results"], "dependencies": ["rlm_config.py"], "consumed_by": ["Manual search", "Tool discovery"], "key_functions": ["load_cache", "search_cache", "list_cache", "main"]}

plugins/spec-kitty-plugin/skills/spec-ki.summary: {"purpose": "Synchronizes spec-kitty configuration files across repositories.", "layer": "Curate / Sync", "usage": "python plugins/spec-kitty-plugin/skills/spec-kitty-agent/scripts/sync_configuration.py --target /path/to/repo", "args": {"--target": "Path to target repository", "--force": "Skip confirmation"}, "inputs": ["spec-kitty config templates"], "outputs": ["Updated .agent/ and .kittify/ configs"], "dependencies": ["shutil", "json", "pathlib"], "consumed_by": ["spec-kitty-plugin init/update workflows"]}

{"purpose": "Validates that valid Spec-Driven Development (SDD) artifacts (spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md) exist and are in the correct state for a given phase (specify, plan, tasks, review).", "layer": "Plugin / Spec-Kitty / Verification", "supported_object_types": ["SDD Artifacts"], "usage": ["python3 plugins/spec-kitty/scripts/verify_workflow_state.py --phase <phase> [--feature <slug> | --wp <WP-ID>]"], "args": ["--phase: Workflow phase (specify, plan, tasks, review)", "--feature: Feature directory slug", "--wp: Work Package ID"], "inputs": ["specs/ or kitty-specs/ directories"], "outputs": ["Console verification report", "Exit code 0 (pass) or 1 (fail)"], "dependencies": [], "consumed_by": ["Spec-Kitty Workflows", "CI/CD"], "key_functions": ["verify_specify", "verify_plan", "verify_tasks", "main"]}

Supports creating, moving, and listing tasks, as well as generating board visualizations.", "layer": "Plugin / Task Manager", "supported_object_types": ["Task", "Kanban Board"], "usage": ["python3 plugins/task-manager/scripts/task_manager.py [create|move|list|board]"], "args": ["create: New task", "move: Change status", "list: Show tasks", "board: Markdown board"], "inputs": ["tasks/"], "outputs": ["tasks/*.md", "kanban_board.md"], "dependencies": [], "consumed_by": ["Manual task management", "Spec-Kitty"], "key_functions": ["create_task", "move_task", "render_board", "main"]}

plugins/tool-inventory/skills/tool-inven.summary: {"purpose": "Initializes a new tool inventory profile and performs first-pass distillation.", "layer": "Bootstrap / Config", "usage": "python plugins/tool-inventory/skills/tool-inventory-init/scripts/tool_inventory_init.py --mode plugins", "args": {"--mode": "Initialization mode (plugins/root/hybrid)"}, "inputs": ["User input", "Templates"], "outputs": ["inventory.json", "rlm_profiles.json entry"], "dependencies": ["pathlib", "json", "sys"], "consumed_by": ["spec-kitty-init workflow"]}

{"purpose": "Audits plugins for structure and compliance with Agent Skills standards.", "layer": "Audit / Compliance", "usage": "python plugins/tool-inventory/skills/tool-inventory/scripts/audit_plugins.py --plugin adr-manager", "args": {"--plugin": "Specific plugin to audit", "--all": "Audit all plugins"}, "inputs": ["Plugin directories", "plugin.json", "SKILL.md"], "outputs": ["Audit results", "Compliance report"], "dependencies": ["pathlib", "json"], "consumed_by": ["tool-inventory-manage workflow", "/plugin-bridge_install"]}

{"purpose": "Fixes relative paths in tool inventory JSON files after move or rename.", "layer": "Curate / Inventory", "usage": "python plugins/tool-inventory/skills/tool-inventory/scripts/fix_inventory_paths.py --inventory path/to/inventory.json", "args": {"--inventory": "Path to inventory file", "--dry-run": "Preview changes only"}, "inputs": ["inventory.json"], "outputs": ["Updated inventory.json"], "dependencies": ["json", "pathlib"], "consumed_by": ["tool-inventory-manage workflow", "/tool-inventory_tool-inventory-manage"]}

{"purpose": "Scans the plugins/ directory and generates a flat JSON manifest of all scripts.", "layer": "Curate / Discovery", "usage": "python plugins/tool-inventory/skills/tool-inventory/scripts/generate_tools_manifest.py --output plugins/tools_manifest.json", "args": {"--output": "Output path for manifest"}, "inputs": ["plugins/ directory structure"], "outputs": ["tools_manifest.json"], "dependencies": ["json", "pathlib", "ast"], "consumed_by": ["tool-inventory-manage workflow", "/tool-inventory_tool-inventory-manage"]}

{"purpose": "Master CLI for managing tool inventories (add, remove, search, list, update).", "layer": "Curate / Discovery", "usage": "python plugins/tool-inventory/skills/tool-inventory/scripts/manage_tool_inventory.py list", "args": {"--path": "Path to tool", "--category": "Tool category", "keyword": "Search keyword"}, "inputs": ["tool_inventory.json", "rlm_tool_cache.json"], "outputs": ["Updated inventory/cache", "Search results"], "dependencies": ["argparse", "pathlib", "json", "ast"], "consumed_by": ["/tool-inventory_tool-inventory-manage"]}

{"purpose": "Rebuilds the tool inventory JSON from scratch by scanning for scripts.", "layer": "Curate / Maintenance", "usage": "python plugins/tool-inventory/skills/tool-inventory/scripts/rebuild_inventory.py --apply", "args": {"--apply": "Save results to inventory", "--scan-all": "Scan entire project instead of just plugins/"}, "inputs": ["Filesystem"], "outputs": ["Rebuilt inventory JSON"], "dependencies": ["pathlib", "json", "datetime"], "consumed_by": ["tool-inventory-manage workflow"]}

{"purpose": "Syncs tool descriptions from script docstrings into the inventory JSON.", "layer": "Curate / Sync", "usage": "python plugins/tool-inventory/skills/tool-inventory/scripts/sync_inventory_descriptions.py --all", "args": {"--all": "Update all tools", "--path": "Update specific tool"}, "inputs": ["Filesystem", "inventory JSON"], "outputs": ["Updated inventory JSON"], "dependencies": ["ast", "pathlib", "json"], "consumed_by": ["tool-inventory-manage workflow"]}

{"purpose": "Embedded ChromaDB wrapper for tool-inventory plugin. Provides a dedicated vector store for tool discovery and semantic search over tool summaries without external dependencies.", "layer": "Plugin / Tool Inventory", "supported_object_types": ["Tool Summaries"], "usage": ["python3 plugins/tool-inventory/skills/tool-inventory/scripts/tool_chroma.py [stats|list|search|import-json]"], "args": ["stats: Show collection stats", "list: List all entries", "search <query>: Semantic search", "import-json <path>: Import from RLM cache"], "inputs": ["rlm_tool_cache.json"], "outputs": ["ChromaDB persistence directory"], "dependencies": ["chromadb"], "consumed_by": ["manage_tool_inventory.py", "Manual Discovery"], "key_functions": ["upsert", "remove", "search", "list_all", "import_from_json", "main"]}

plugins/vector-db/skills/vector-db-agent.summary: {"purpose": "Cleans up the vector database by removing stale or orphan entries.", "layer": "Maintenance / Core", "usage": "python plugins/vector-db/skills/vector-db-agent/scripts/cleanup.py --orphan-only", "args": {"--orphan-only": "Only remove files that no longer exist on disk"}, "inputs": ["Vector DB", "Filesystem"], "outputs": ["Cleanup report", "Pruned index"], "dependencies": ["chromadb", "pathlib"], "consumed_by": ["/vector-db_cleanup"]}

{"purpose": "Core ingestion engine for the Project RAG system using ChromaDB.", "layer": "Core / RAG", "usage": "python plugins/vector-db/skills/vector-db-agent/scripts/ingest.py --incremental", "args": {"--full": "Purge and re-index all", "--incremental": "Only index modified files"}, "inputs": ["Filesystem documents (.md, .py, .js, .txt)"], "outputs": ["Updated ChromaDB collection"], "dependencies": ["chromadb", "langchain", "pathlib"], "consumed_by": ["/vector-db_ingest"]}

{"purpose": "Shim for ingesting code files with specialized chunking for functions/classes.", "layer": "Core / RAG", "usage": "python plugins/vector-db/skills/vector-db-agent/scripts/ingest_code_shim.py --file path/to/code.py", "args": {"--file": "Target code file"}, "inputs": ["Python/JS source files"], "outputs": ["Code-aware chunks in Vector DB"], "dependencies": ["ast", "pathlib", "chromadb"], "consumed_by": ["vector-db ingest workflow"]}

{"purpose": "Common operations for interacting with the Project vector database.", "layer": "Core / RAG", "usage": "python plugins/vector-db/skills/vector-db-agent/scripts/operations.py stats", "args": {"--collection": "Target collection name"}, "inputs": ["ChromaDB"], "outputs": ["Status/Stats objects"], "dependencies": ["chromadb", "pydantic"], "consumed_by": ["vector-db scripts"]}

{"purpose": "CLI for performing semantic search queries against the Project RAG index.", "layer": "Discovery / Search", "usage": "python plugins/vector-db/skills/vector-db-agent/scripts/query.py \"search query\"", "args": {"--limit": "Max results", "query": "Search text"}, "inputs": ["Vector DB"], "outputs": ["Search results JSON/text"], "dependencies": ["chromadb", "argparse"], "consumed_by": ["/vector-db_query"]}

{"purpose": "Configuration loader and path resolver for the vector-db plugin.", "layer": "Core / Config", "usage": "python plugins/vector-db/skills/vector-db-agent/scripts/vector_config.py", "args": {}, "inputs": ["vector_profiles.json"], "outputs": ["Config objects"], "dependencies": ["json", "pathlib"], "consumed_by": ["vector-db scripts"]}

{"purpose": "Checks the structural consistency of the Project vector database.", "layer": "Audit / RAG", "usage": "python plugins/vector-db/skills/vector-db-agent/scripts/vector_consistency_check.py", "args": {}, "inputs": ["ChromaDB metadata"], "outputs": ["Inconsistency report"], "dependencies": ["chromadb", "pathlib"], "consumed_by": ["vector-db maintenance"]}
